candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component only, not the total; less appropriate than the explicit total line.
Subcomponent of other current assets, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents closing balance
candidates.why: Cash flow statement balance line, but balance sheet cash is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents opening balance
candidates.why: Opening cash balance, not the preferred balance sheet line.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as required.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component within current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term debt/current interest-bearing liabilities; excludes non-debt current liabilities.
Appears to be the non-lease remainder after separately listed lease liabilities and accrued interest; could be used if excluding lease liabilities from the total were necessary.
Current lease liabilities are explicitly excluded from STD under the baseline rule.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the non-lease debt component to comply with the rule excluding lease liabilities. The sheet separately presents 'Lease liabilities' and 'Accrued interest'; 'Interest-bearing current liabilities - remaining' appears to be the clean financing debt amount excluding leases, avoiding double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact match for PPE total/net carrying amount; preferred over balancing or gross component lines.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/subtotal style line; less clean than the main PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross component, not preferred total PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the main reported PPE line, which is the preferred total/net PPE measure.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.
